Yanmar · Engine

Yanmar 6EY26LW / 8EY26LW

Confirmed OEM spare parts for the Yanmar 6EY26LW / 8EY26LW marine diesel (260×385 mm bore × stroke, 1,030–2,060 kW).

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
CYLINDER HEAD / VALVES 4
Part NumberDescription
746673-15104Indicator Cock Assembly
151694-11120Valve Suction SUH37 (inlet valve – heat-resistant steel)
142613-03541Gasket Valve (fuel system / head joint)
142613-11231Screw Adjust (tappet / rocker arm clearance)
CYLINDER LINER SEALS 2
Part NumberDescription
151605-01351Rubber Gasket Cylinder Liner (lower seal) (alt: 151623-01320)
151623-01321Rubber Gasket Cylinder Liner (upper)
CONNECTING ROD 2
Part NumberDescription
151605-23210Connecting Rod Nut
151604-18720Bolt Collar (con-rod / cover mounting)
PUMPS & COOLING 3
Part NumberDescription
133970-32100Bush Pump (water pump impeller bearing bush)
132659-35501Strainer Element (LO / fuel duplex strainer)
132654-92510Handle Turning (engine turning device)
PIPING & FITTINGS 7
Part NumberDescription
132310-66590Pin Connect Pipe (injection pipe retaining pin)
137600-51560Joint (pipe union fitting)
137600-55920Packing (pipe joint seal)
139653-91170Connector (fuel / LO line)
141616-39550Pipe Joint Bolt
141616-66220Plate Stopper (pipe clamp retainer)
146674-01440Connect Pipe
SEALS, GASKETS & O-RINGS 3
Part NumberDescription
148633-53600O-Ring (general engine use)
147676-49470Gasket Oval (manifold / cover joint)
146673-59020Packing (general engine seal)
INSTRUMENTS & CONTROLS 2
Part NumberDescription
146673-91430Pressure Gauge (1.0 MPa – general)
146673-09150Knob (stop / start control or valve handle)

ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
